# farauti-qld-paper

Fitsum! 

This is a github repository for code and data supporting our farauti QLD spatial genetics paper. We will work on this repository together and, when we are finished, it will accompany the publication so that other scientists can review and re-use the code and data should they wish.

## Git and github
We will follow a git-based version control system. See [here](https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/git/what-is-git-version-control/) for more info. This may look complicated (and it can be in large teams), at a basic level it allows us to save and track our progress, and make sure that we don't overwrite or lose our work as we go. In practice, this will mean learning a few new concepts and command-line commands. 

All of the analysis code for the paper will be in "notebooks". The sample data is under "metadata". The genotype data are on /scratch in Bunya - more on this when we meet in person.

## Environment
A lot of the tools and software we need for this paper are externally developed software libraries - mainly in Python. To use these effectively, we will need to create an "environment" that allows us to access the correct tools and versions. We will deal with this in person but in essence, everything we need is contained in this [github](https://github.com/tristanpwdennis/cairn/tree/main) repository.
